# FIRE &amp; DRIVE — 30-Second Opening Voiceover
### Read this over the rotating commercial. Confidential · PCN inner circle.

---

## ★ FINAL READ (recorded)

> For years… we've **rented** the fire.
>
> Chasing leads — spending thousands.
>
> Fire and Drive ends that.
>
> We **own** the storm. We **own** the data. We **own** the leads. We **own** the industry.
>
> The fire was always here. We just started **the drive** to own it — *forever.*
>
> This… is **Fire and Drive.**

---

## DELIVERY NOTES (how to read it)

- **Open slow and low.** "For years… we've rented the fire" — let it hang. That pause is the hook.
- **Punch the three "OWN"s** — data, leads, territory. Same rhythm each time, a half-beat harder each time.
- **Soften** on "the fire was always here / in this company / in these reps" — this is the warm, human turn. Slow down.
- Lean on **"the drive"** in the second-to-last line — it's the brand name turning into action.
- **Beat of silence** before the last line. Then land **"This is Fire and Drive"** with full weight.
- Total: aim for ~28–32 seconds. If your video is shorter, use the Lightning cut below.

---

## ⚡ LIGHTNING CUT — ~18–20 seconds (~55 words)
*Use if the trimmed video runs short.*

> For years, we've paid for fire — again and again, for storms that already crossed our own backyard.
>
> Fire and Drive ends that. We **own** the data. We **own** the leads. We **own** the territory.
>
> The fire was always here. We just started the drive to own it — forever.
>
> This is **Fire and Drive.**

---

## 🎙️ RECORDING TIPS (your own voice)

1. **Quiet room, soft surfaces** — a closet or car is gold (kills echo).
2. **Phone Voice Memos** is perfect. Hold the phone **6–8 inches** to the side of your mouth (not straight on — avoids popping).
3. Record **2–3 takes.** Read it like you mean it — this is the keynote, not a memo.
4. Leave **1 second of silence** at the start and end of the take.
5. Export / share the take as an **.m4a or .mp3** and drop it to me. I'll clean it up, balance it under the video, and sync it to the cut.
